We're Desert Home Services — we do both HVAC and plumbing under one roof. AC side we focus on repair and tune-ups, plumbing side it's mainly drains and water heaters. Got a team of five — three HVAC guys and two plumbers. We keep it simple on pricing, AC diagnostic is $89, plumbing diagnostic is $99, tune-ups $149. Monday through Friday, 7:30 to 5. No weekends unless it's an emergency.
